scenarios.name: baseline — swap widget (staked-basis mode) + transfer widget render

expected.notes: No execution; assert swap widget defaults to stable→weETH and the transfer widget mounts alongside it.

scenarios.name: swap 50000 USDC → weETH for the LST leg

expected.notes: LST leg of the CARRY_STAKED_BASIS strategy — stable swapped into weETH for the staked-long side.
Margin leg — send mode uses a placeholder destination address; widget emits a TRANSFER row on the shared mock ledger.

scenarios.name: second swap 15000 USDC → weETH appends another SWAP row

expected.notes: Confirm ledger append is idempotent across multiple executes on the same surface.

scenarios.name: slippage tolerance change re-renders expected-output (no order)

expected.notes: Reactive-only scenario — no order placed. Tightening slippage recomputes the route memo.
